title: BABIES FIRST! - 211info
text: CROOK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH BABIES FIRST! Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A public health nurse (PHN) home visiting program that partners with families to improve pregnancy, family and child health outcomes. Provides health and developmental screenings, health and nutrition education, infant and child development tips, breastfeeding support, and referrals to community resources that center on the family's needs. 375 NW Beaver Street Suite 100 Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Perinatal people, infants and children 0-5, and parent or primary caregivers with a higher risk for health issues. Risk factors may include prematurity, teenage parents, at-risk caregiver, domestic violence, drug-exposed infants. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 447-5165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 447-5165 Main phone Main phone (541) 447-5165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Case/Care Management * Families with Infants/Toddlers Home Based Parenting Education Nutrition Education * Families with Infants/Toddlers Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CROOK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
